summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 bug fixes in ReversePicks: 1) Natural search finding players, 2) International teams loading, 3) Player search deduplication, 4) Player photo/nationality display. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all fixes working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Donnarumma search returns single result (deduplication working)
Backend: Donnarumma has team info (Manchester City, not 'Unknown')
Backend: Donnarumma shows full name (Gianluigi Donnarumma, not G. Donnarumma)
Backend: Donnarumma has photo URL and nationality (Italy)
Backend: Messi search returns Lionel Messi at Inter Miami as first result
Backend: Salah search with EPL (league 39) returns Mohamed Salah at Liverpool
Backend: WCQ UEFA (league 34) returns teams (10 teams)
Backend: WCQ CONMEBOL (league 30) returns teams
Backend: Euro Qualifiers (league 96) endpoint works
Backend: Natural search parses 'Gianluigi Donnarumma 52.5 passes vs Arsenal' correctly
Backend: Natural search finds player after parsing query
Backend: Owner auto-login (josselj001@gmail.com) works - bypasses password
Backend: POTD available with player name
Backend: Health endpoint returns ok
Frontend: Owner auto-login works - main app loads
Frontend: POTD card visible with player (Khvicha Kvaratskhelia)
Frontend: International Team leagues visible in wizard (WCQ UEFA, CONMEBOL, etc.)
Frontend: Player search shows photos (circular player images)
Frontend: Player search shows nationality before team (e.g., 'Italy · Manchester City')
Frontend: Player search shows full names (Gianluigi Donnarumma, not abbreviated)
Frontend: Donnarumma search returns 1 result (deduplication working)
Frontend: Salah search shows 'Egypt · Liverpool'
Frontend: Mbappe search shows 'France · Lille' and 'France · Real Madrid'
Frontend: Step 3 (Opponent Selection) shows teams for international tournaments
critical_code_review_comments: Player search now tries 8 major leagues in parallel before falling back to profiles - good for getting team info
De-duplication by player ID with team-info preference works correctly
Full name construction from firstname+lastname is working
International teams endpoint tries 5 seasons (2026/2025/2024/2023/2022) - handles different tournament schedules
Player photo and nationality fields properly extracted and displayed in UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: 1) Natural search finds Donnarumma, 2) International teams load for WCQ/Euro Qualifiers, 3) Player search deduplicated (1 result not 7), 4) Player photos and nationality displayed. POTD shows Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. Owner auto-login works.

bug_1_natural_search.description: Natural search now finds players like Gianluigi Donnarumma
bug_1_natural_search.verification: Backend parses query correctly, player search returns results with team info

bug_2_international_teams.description: Step-by-step wizard shows teams for WCQ and other international tournaments
bug_2_international_teams.verification: WCQ UEFA (league 34) returns 10 teams, endpoint tries multiple seasons

bug_3_player_deduplication.description: Player search returns 1 result for Donnarumma, not 7 duplicates
bug_3_player_deduplication.verification: De-duplication by player ID working, prefers entries with team info

bug_4_player_photos_nationality.description: Player cards show photo and nationality
bug_4_player_photos_nationality.verification: UI shows circular player photos, nationality displayed before team name (e.g., 'Italy · Manchester City')
